name: Feature request
about: Propose a new detector, a dashboard capability, or an integration.
labels: enhancement

## The shape that's missing

(What pattern, workflow, or capability is rothunter not catching today?)

## Why it matters

(Concrete real-world impact — a bug it would catch, an hour saved per
scan, a class of FP it would eliminate.)

## Proposed direction

(Sketch of the heuristic / endpoint / UI affordance. Skip the
implementation detail; focus on the user-visible outcome.)

## Alternatives considered

(Other approaches you ruled out — keeps the discussion grounded.)
